productDisplayName: Puma Men Black and Grey Rugby Polo T-shirt
description: Style NoteThe German brand puma is known world over for their infusion of colour and minimalist styling into classic wardrobe staples. With its fine finishing and detailing this striped Polo neck T-shirt easily makes it to our wishlist for the Summer. Pair it with distressed denims and flip-flops for a rugged look or with track pants and sneakers for a workout.Product DetailsBlack and grey striped(panels) polo neck T-shirt, white spread collar, short buttoned placket , short sleeves with branding on left sleeve, applique on left front chest, brand badge on left hem, vented hemMaterials and Care100% cottonWash and iron inside outMachine wash warm Warm ironSize and FitRegular fitThe model(height 6'and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
